# Vaibhav Kapoor — Applied AI Engineer

> Portfolio for Applied AI Engineering, AI Solutions Architecture, and Engineering leadership roles. Fifteen shipped projects across SaaS, AI agents, educational AI, dashboards, and mobile.

## Featured projects

- [Jarvis V5](/projects/jarvis-v5): Privacy-first multi-agent family AI. Three-tier safety, family ACL, pgvector long-term memory, 23+ tools, voice + Telegram + web.
- [PostyPop](/projects/postypop): Live SaaS that turns one piece of content into 22 platform-tuned variations. Multi-model fallback (Groq, Llama, Compound, GPT-4o), Lemon Squeezy payments, approved Chrome extension.
- [KidsAI Buddy](/projects/kidsai-buddy): Kid-safe educational AI used daily by seven kids. Local Ollama, local Kokoro TTS, four-layer safety pipeline, gamification, parent admin.
- [Jarvis Mac](/projects/jarvis-mac): Fully local voice assistant on Apple Silicon. mlx-lm Gemma 3.1, speculative decoding, per-session prompt cache, acoustic pronunciation learning, on-device RAG.
- [Mission Control](/projects/mission-control): Homelab dashboard that watches 50 projects and writes daily LLM-summarized pulses. Tier 2 observability, 4 launchd agents, Telegram delivery.
- [Prerna Kapoor](/projects/prerna-kapoor): Full WordPress site for a Colorado realtor with three Claude-powered AI workflows: a site chatbot, a backend listing-creation bot, and a scheduled autopublishing blog pipeline. Bilingual (EN / JP). Paid client.

## Other work

- [Foundation Implants](/projects/foundation-implants): 40-page premium WordPress redesign for a Colorado periodontics practice. Paid commercial engagement ($5,500 + retainer).
- [Expense Tracker](/projects/expense-tracker): Mobile-first PWA used daily by my mother in India.
- [Market Pulse](/projects/market-pulse): Daily 7-tab market intelligence dashboard with scheduled LLM aggregation.
- [Realtor Buddy](/projects/realtor-buddy): React Native field tool with Whisper voice notes and Claude-powered analysis.
- [Markdown App (Codex)](/projects/markdown-app): Premium SwiftUI markdown reader for macOS, iPad, iOS.
- [Crypto Portfolio](/projects/crypto-portfolio): Multi-exchange P&L viewer (trading bots retired 2026-04-19).
- [Games & Experiments](/projects/games): Interactive prototypes.
